lockScale.description: Whether to lock scale at 1.0 regardless of parent scale.

maxTiltDegrees.description: Maximum tilt angle from upright in degrees. 0.0 = no tilt allowed.

rotationFollow.description: How much rotation to inherit from parent. 0.0 = billboard, 1.0 = full inherit.

oneOf.description:
URL-safe unique identifier for a persona.
Validation: non-empty, `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]`, max 64 characters.
oneOf.title: PersonaId

id.description:
A strongly-typed asset identifier.

Wraps a `String` but provides type safety so arbitrary strings cannot be
passed where an asset ID is expected. Serializes transparently as a plain
JSON string so the HTTP/JSON API schema is unchanged.
id.title: AssetId

source.description:
Webview source information (response).
In list responses (GET /webviews), Html content is omitted (None).
In detail responses (GET /webviews/{id}), Html content is included.
source.title: WebviewSourceInfo

transform.description: Current transform (translation = intended offset from parent).
transform.title: TransformArgs
